THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF 221 MAIN, LLC RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT TRITON FUNDING GROUP, INC., A CALIFORNIA CORPORATION THE RESTITUTION AND POSSESSION OF THE PREMISES: 221 MAIN STREET, SUITES 800 & 840, SAN FRANCISCO, CA, LEASE FORFEITED, ATTORNEY'S FEES & COSTS ARE COMBINED UNDER COSTS. THE EXACT AMOUNT FOR EACH IS NOT INDICATED IN THE JUDGMENT. CREDIT ADJUSTMENT AND SECURITY DEPOSIT ARE COMBINED. PLEASE SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT FOR THE MONETARY DAMAGES ITEMIZATION.
